title: docker stop construction && echo 'lol jk it has restart: always'
lead:
# This container was supposed to be temporary.
# It now has 47 dependent services.
# The Dockerfile is 800 lines.
# Nobody remembers the build args.
# It runs as root.
# We are afraid of it.
cta.home: docker restart home # the universal fix
status.aria: # EXPOSE 9001 # accessibility-checker port (commented out since day 1)
status.title: docker inspect construction --format '{{.State.Status}}'
status.structure: layers: 247 # each one adds 'just one more thing'
status.content:
docker logs construction --tail 1
> 'still refining content...' (repeated 847,293 times)
pillar.roadmap.title: # roadmap service (CrashLoopBackOff since Tuesday)
pillar.roadmap.description:
services:
  roadmap:
    restart: always # because it crashes. always.
    deploy:
      restart_policy:
        condition: any
        max_attempts: 999999
pillar.craft.title: FROM presentation:ambitious AS craft
pillar.craft.description:
RUN npm install --production
# 'production' is doing a lot of heavy lifting in that sentence
# node_modules: 2.1GB
# actual code: 47KB
pillar.launch.title: docker push launch:soon # soon(TM)
pillar.launch.description:
# Deploy pipeline:
# 1. docker-compose up -d
# 2. pray
# 3. docker-compose logs -f | grep -i error
# 4. cry
# 5. docker-compose restart
# 6. repeat
